summary: Device Health Dashboard feature testing complete. All 23 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified for Guardian health cards and Operator health table. Both views working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/my/seniors/{id}/device-health returns array of device health objects for guardian's owned seniors
GET /api/operator/device-health returns array with senior_name/guardian_name across all devices (operator only)
Reliability score correctly computed in 0-100 range (weighted: 40% uptime + 30% battery + 30% signal - offline_penalty)
Battery object contains latest/average/min values from heartbeat telemetry
Signal object contains latest/average values from heartbeat telemetry
Uptime percent calculated as heartbeat_count/expected_heartbeats*100 (capped at 100)
Offline count reflects device_offline incidents in the time window (24h default)
Guardian endpoint is ownership-scoped - returns 404 for non-owned seniors
Operator endpoint requires operator role - returns 403 for guardian role
Window hours parameter (default 24) configurable on both endpoints
Frontend DeviceHealthCard renders with battery gauge, signal meter, uptime %, reliability badge
Frontend Operator table renders with sortable columns (uptime, battery, offline, reliability)
Frontend Device Health nav item appears in operator sidebar (op-nav-device-health)
Frontend full_name displays in sidebar for users with full_name set
Frontend email displays as fallback in sidebar for users without full_name (verified)
seed_data_creation: None - tests use existing seniors and devices (John Doe with DEV-001, DEV-002, E2E-DEV-27596)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Device Health Dashboard fully functional. Guardian view at /family/seniors shows per-device health cards after selecting a senior. Operator view at /operator/device-health shows sortable table across all devices. Health metrics include: reliability_score (0-100 composite), battery (latest/avg/min), signal (latest/avg), uptime_percent, heartbeat_count, offline_count. Data-testids: device-health-section, op-device-health-page, op-nav-device-health, reliability-score-{device_id}, user-display-name, op-user-display-name. JWT tokens contain email and full_name for frontend user display.

backend_api_tests: GET /api/my/seniors/{id}/device-health returns array of device health objects
Device health object has required fields (device_id, device_identifier, status, battery, signal, uptime_percent, offline_count, reliability_score)
Window hours parameter works (tested with 12 hours)
Guardian endpoint ownership-scoped (404 for non-owned senior)
Guardian endpoint requires authentication (401/403 without auth)
Operator response has senior_name and guardian_name fields
Operator endpoint requires operator role (403 for guardian)
All reliability score components present (uptime, battery.latest, signal.average, offline_count)
JWT token contains email and full_name in payload
frontend_ui_tests: User display name shows email as fallback (full_name=null)
Device health section (data-testid=device-health-section) loads after senior selection
Device Health nav item in sidebar (data-testid=op-nav-device-health)
9 device rows found in operator table (data-testid=op-device-row-*)
Sortable columns present (reliability_score, uptime_percent, battery_latest, offline_count)

verified_features: GET /api/my/seniors/{id}/device-health returns device health metrics for guardian's devices
GET /api/operator/device-health returns health metrics across all devices (operator only)
Reliability score correctly computed (0-100 range, weighted: 40% uptime + 30% battery + 30% signal)
Battery latest/avg/min values returned correctly from heartbeat telemetry
Signal latest/avg values returned correctly from heartbeat telemetry
Uptime percent calculated as heartbeat_count / expected_heartbeats * 100
Offline count reflects device_offline incidents in the time window
Guardian endpoint is ownership-scoped (can't access other guardian's seniors)
Frontend: Guardian Device Health cards render with battery gauge, signal meter, uptime %, reliability badge
Frontend: Operator Device Health table renders with sortable columns
Frontend: Operator Device Health nav item appears in sidebar
Frontend: full_name displays in sidebar for users with full_name set
Frontend: email displays as fallback in sidebar for users without full_name
